prompt: Messy whiteboard/drawingboard visualization on dark background (#0a0e14). Hand-drawn sketchy style showing rich context flowing into AI coding assistant. A large sketchy robot/AI head or terminal window in center receiving multiple streams of information. Floating chunks of text, code snippets, diagrams, documents all flowing in with messy arrows. Words scribbled like 'context', 'code', 'docs'. The AI/terminal glowing with understanding. Exclamation marks, lightbulbs, stars around it showing 'eureka' moment. Whiteboard marker aesthetic, imperfect lines, chaotic but purposeful. Colors: orange (#f0883e), green (#7ee787), blue (#79c0ff) on dark background.
